---

## About

Sermaraja V is an Associate System Engineer at Devopstrio Ltd. with experience across cloud infrastructure, Azure solutions, full stack web development, UI/UX design, technical documentation, SEO, digital marketing, and enterprise solution architecture.

He builds modern web applications, cloud solutions, AI-powered experiences, Microsoft Azure solutions, technical documentation, marketing assets, and responsive user interfaces.

His work combines engineering, design, and business strategy to deliver production-ready digital solutions.

---

## Featured Projects

Personal Portfolio Website

Modern SEO-optimized portfolio built with Next.js featuring responsive design, animations, AI-ready metadata, structured data, performance optimization, and modern UI.

Azure Cloud Documentation

Created enterprise cloud documentation covering Azure migration, governance, security, networking, monitoring, backup, Microsoft Entra ID, Microsoft Intune, Microsoft 365, and cloud operations.

Enterprise Proposal Development

Prepared professional proposals, solution architectures, client presentations, technical documents, migration strategies, and infrastructure planning documents.

Marketing & Branding

Designed company branding, social media creatives, brochures, whitepapers, event materials, presentations, and digital marketing assets.

Recognized by Devopstrio Ltd. for outstanding collaboration, teamwork, technical contribution, knowledge sharing, and continuous support across engineering and business teams.
